source_pr.title: planner: recalculate as-of ts of staleread when plan is cached
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #43044

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Recalculate the snapshot ts for staleread when it's provided by as of statement.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Fix the bug that prepared staleread cannot read following changes.
```

symptoms: stmtID, _, _, err := tk.Session().PrepareStmt("select * from t as of timestamp now(3) - interval 1000 microsecond order by id asc") (executor/stale_txn_test.go)
failure_signature: stmtID, _, _, err := tk.Session().PrepareStmt("select * from t as of timestamp now(3) - interval 1000 microsecond order by id asc") (executor/stale_txn_test.go)
fix_pattern: stmtID, _, _, err := tk.Session().PrepareStmt("select * from t as of timestamp now(3) - interval 1000 microsecond order by id asc") (executor/stale_txn_test.go)

evidence: evidence: stmtID, _, _, err := tk.Session().PrepareStmt("select * from t as of timestamp now(3) - interval 1000 microsecond order by id asc") (executor/stale_txn_test.go)

analysis:

PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/43204
Triage sources: manual_triage, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: stmtID, _, _, err := tk.Session().PrepareStmt("select * from t as of timestamp now(3) - interval 1000 microsecond order by id asc") (executor/stale_txn_test.go)
Changed files (2): executor/stale_txn_test.go, sessiontxn/staleread/processor.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
